sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23151" key="d" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δ</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δέλτα</orth> (q. v.), fourth letter of the Gr. alphabet: as numeral, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δ᾽,</foreign> <sense id="n23151.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">τέσσαρες</ref> </xr> and <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τέταρτος,</foreign> but <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign"><num TEIform="num">δ᾽</num></foreign>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:000" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">000</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
